title: Dial ActionHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the actionHook when a dial verb completes, either because the dialed party hung up, the call was not answered, or an error occurred.

dial_call_status.description: Final status of the outbound (dialed) call leg.

dial_sip_status.description: SIP response code from the dialed party (e.g. 200, 486, 487).

dial_call_sid.description: Call SID of the outbound (dialed) call leg.

dial_sbc_callid.description: SBC-level Call-ID for the outbound (dialed) call leg.
